name: Datadog, Inc.
description: Datadog, Inc. provides a monitoring and analytics platform for developers, IT operations teams, and business users in the cloud age. The company's SaaS platform integrates and automates infrastructure monitoring, application performance monitoring, log management, and real-time business monitoring to provide unified, real-time observability of its customers' entire technology stack. Datadog's solutions are used by organizations of all sizes and across a wide range of industries to enable digital transformation and cloud migration, drive collaboration among teams, and accelerate time to market for applications.
